denial_rationale_seed: Aetna medical policy considers PRP experimental and investigational for Achilles tendinopathy. Furthermore, a less costly modality is appropriate. Plan policy requires a step-down therapeutic approach, such as a localized corticosteroid injection, prior to authorization.
rebuttal_seed: Corticosteroid injection is contraindicated for this patient due to an elevated risk of Achilles tendon rupture. Patient factors make the substituted modality unsafe.
